title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 324.709 - Effective date of license — annual renewal
text:
324.709.  Effective date of license — annual renewal. — A license issued pursuant to sections 324.700 to 327.742 shall be effective for a period of one year from the date of issuance and shall be renewable on an annual basis.
(L. 2001 H.B. 567 merged with S.B. 317)
